user.description: Please add your Smappee Dashboard credentials

reauth_confirm.description: Update your Smappee Dashboard credentials to reconnect

service_location_not_in_entry.message: Service location {service_location_id} does not belong to config entry {config_entry_id}

multiple_service_locations.message: Multiple service locations detected. Provide service_location_id.

no_station_client.message: No station client found for config entry {config_entry_id} and service location {service_location_id}.

no_connector_client.message: No matching connector client found for config entry {config_entry_id}, service location {service_location_id}, connector {connector_id}.

no_api2_connector_client.message: No matching API 2 connector client found for config entry {config_entry_id}, charging station serial {charging_station_serial}, connector {connector_id}. Provide charging_station_serial if multiple charging stations share the same connector position.

cannot_resolve_connector_client.message: Cannot resolve connector client. Provide connector_id if ambiguous.

current_out_of_range.message: Current {current} A is out of range {min_current}-{max_current} A for this connector.

start_charging.name: Start charging
start_charging.description: Start charging. If 'current' is omitted, the configured or minimum current will be used.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional: specific config entry id to target (when multiple entries).

service_location_id.name: Service Location ID
service_location_id.description: Optional: ID of the site (leave empty if only one site).

connector_id.name: Connector ID
connector_id.description: Optional: connector number (1 or 2, leave empty if only one).

current.name: Current (A)
current.description: Optional: charging current to use (in Ampere).

pause_charging.name: Pause charging
pause_charging.description: Pause charging for the selected connector via the Dashboard v10 device action when available.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional: specific config entry id to target (when multiple entries).

service_location_id.name: Service Location ID
service_location_id.description: Optional: ID of the site (leave empty if only one site).

pause_charging_chargingstations.name: Pause charging (chargingstations)
pause_charging_chargingstations.description: Compatibility service: pause charging via the Dashboard v10 action.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional: specific config entry id to target (when multiple entries).

service_location_id.name: Service Location ID
service_location_id.description: Optional: ID of the site (leave empty if only one site).

stop_charging.name: Stop charging
stop_charging.description: Stop charging for the selected connector.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional: specific config entry id to target (when multiple entries).

service_location_id.name: Service Location ID
service_location_id.description: Optional: ID of the site (leave empty if only one site).

set_current.name: Set current
set_current.description: Set the charging current in Ampere (1 decimal precision). Converted to the nearest integer percentage and sent via setPercentageLimit. The slider and number entities update immediately.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional: specific config entry id to target (when multiple entries).

service_location_id.name: Service Location ID
service_location_id.description: Optional: ID of the site (leave empty if only one site).

connector_id.name: Connector ID
connector_id.description: Optional: connector number (1 or 2, leave empty if only one).

current.name: Current (A)
current.description: Charging current in Ampere (1 decimal, e.g. 11.4). Clamped to the connector's configured min–max range.

set_charging_mode.name: Set charging mode
set_charging_mode.description: Set the charging mode of a connector.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional: specific config entry id to target (when multiple entries).

service_location_id.name: Service Location ID
service_location_id.description: Optional: ID of the site (leave empty if only one site).

set_charging_mode_chargingstations.name: Set charging mode (chargingstations)
set_charging_mode_chargingstations.description: Compatibility service: map NORMAL, SMART and PAUSED to Dashboard v10 charging actions.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Optional: specific config entry id to target (when multiple entries).

charging_station_serial.name: Charging station serial
charging_station_serial.description: Optional: charging station serial number. Provide it when multiple stations share the same connector position.

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Optional: limit value (only used when mode is NORMAL).

limit_unit.name: Limit unit
limit_unit.description: Optional: unit for limit when mode is NORMAL (AMPERE or PERCENTAGE).
